title: dysoxylum purpureum
intro: Dysoxylum purpureum, also known as purple dysoxylum or purple dyso, is a species of plant in the family Meliaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia and the Pacific Islands. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Dysoxylum purpureum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Dysoxylum purpureum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional remedies, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for modern use.
